## Summary

- describe the behavior change
- note affected packages or groups

## Validation

- [ ] `mc validate`
- [ ] relevant tests
- [ ] relevant lint/build commands

## Release metadata

- [ ] Added or updated a `.changeset/*.md` file for behavior changes in published crates
- [ ] Changeset targets configured package or group ids

## Docs

- [ ] Updated docs, READMEs, fixtures, or templates when behavior changed
